title: Extracting Financial Transactions from CSV Data
scenario: A company has financial transaction data stored in a CSV file, including transaction ID, date, amount, and category. The goal is to extract the total amount spent in each category over the past quarter and present the extracted information in a formatted markdown table
constraints: Must use a library to handle CSV parsing
Must group transactions by category and date range

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the transactions are grouped correctly by category and date range
Check if the code is syntactically correct
Check if the extracted financial information is accurate and matches the expected results
